results.title: Why Is News Corp (ASX:NWS) Reshaping Its Share Buy-Back Strategy?
results.description: News Corp has clarified its latest share repurchase programme, confirming it applies only to Nasdaq-listed shares while excluding ASX-listed CHESS Depositary Interests.

results.title: A Beloved Home Goods Brand Was Facing Bankruptcy. Now Schoolhouse Is Making a Comeback
results.description: The brand was acquired by the Hudson Valley Lighting Group for $2.2 million in February. It’s now officially relaunching.

results.title: Montgomery Regional Airport reports 76% increase in July 4 travel this year
results.description: Montgomery Regional Airport is expecting around 2,200 passengers to fly out from their facility over the July 4 holiday travel period, which would be over a 75% increase from the 1,250 departing passengers the airport saw in the same time period last year.

results.title: Another OC city is asking voters to approve taxes to shore up budgets
results.description: Santa Ana voters could see sales tax measure on November ballot.
